name: Onion & Corn Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Pearl onions, blanch and peel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter and oil together over low heat.
2. Add the chopped onions, garlic, and pearl onions to the pan.
3. Cook and stir until the onions are golden, about 15 minutes, without browning them.
4. Combine the tomatoes, brown sugar, honey, white wine, cider vinegar, lemon juice, water, dried currants, fennel seeds, and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
5. Stir this mixture into the onion mixture.
6. Cover and simmer over low heat until the onions are tender.
7. Stir frequently to prevent burning.
8. Uncover and continue cooking until thick and syrupy, stirring constantly.
9. Add the cooked corn to the relish.
10. Cook for an additional 15 minutes.
11. Allow the relish to cool completely before spooning into clean, half-pint glass containers with tight-fitting lids.
12. Refrigerate until ready to serve. Bring to room temperature before serving.
